topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules that automate smart-home devices based on presence detection or specific events, such as turning lights on or off when someone is detected or when a user leaves a designated area.

rows.if_then_rule: IF Current condition changes to rain THEN Close garage door using Garageio.
IF Temperature rises above a configured threshold THEN Switch on fan using SmartThings before the A/C.
IF Oven turned on THEN Blink lights using Philips Hue.
IF Oven turned on THEN Turn on fan for 15 minutes using Nest Thermostat.
IF Mode switched to Away mode THEN End activity using Harmony.
IF New check-in tagged with #home THEN Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF New check-in tagged with #home THEN Turn on the lights using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF New check-in at airport category THEN Turn on then off using WeMo Light Switch.
IF New check-in tagged from Foursquare THEN Voice announcement using Ubi.
IF New check-in at home category THEN Turn on lights using Philips Hue.
IF Someone unknown has been seen THEN Change color using Philips Hue.
IF Someone unknown has been seen THEN myStrom device on.
IF Someone known has been seen THEN Display Notification using LaMetric Time.
IF Temperature rises above a configured threshold THEN Turn A/C on using Wink: Aros.
IF Button press THEN Activate overwork timer using Nefit Easy.
IF Button press THEN Set room temperature using Nefit Easy.
IF Flash button double pressed THEN Switch on using SmartThings.
IF Flash button double pressed THEN Toggle lights on/off using Philips Hue.
IF Flash button double pressed THEN Toggle light on/off using Emberlight.
IF Short Press THEN Set mood using Stack Lighting (Staging).
IF Every day at a configured time THEN Set cook timer and mode using WeMo Slow Cooker.
IF You exit an area THEN Turn off using WeMo Lighting.
IF Every hour at a configured time THEN Return to tado automatic control using tado Heating.
IF Smart Home/Away from ecobee THEN Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF tado switches to Away Mode THEN Turn off using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF tado switches to Away Mode THEN Switch off a socket using LightwaveRF Power.
IF tado switches to Away Mode THEN Turn off light using LightwaveRF Lighting.
IF Button press THEN Turn heating off using tado Heating.
IF Button press THEN Start Cool Mode using tado Air Conditioning.
IF Button press THEN Start Heat Mode using tado Air Conditioning.
IF Tomorrow's high rises above a configured threshold THEN Turn off your thermostat using Hive Active Heating.
IF Current condition changes THEN Start activity using Harmony.
IF New motion event THEN Turn light on using Emberlight.
IF Flash button double pressed THEN Toggle on/off using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Stone press THEN Toggle lights on/off using LIFX.
IF Any incoming call THEN Turn on then off using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Incoming call from known number THEN Turn on then off using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Incoming call from unknown number THEN Turn on then off using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Incoming call from known number THEN Turn on then off using WeMo Insight Switch.
IF Incoming call from unknown number THEN Turn on then off using WeMo Insight Switch.
IF Incoming call from unknown number THEN Change color using LIFX.
IF Event starting soon THEN Blink lights using Philips Hue.
IF Every year on a configured date THEN Change color of lights using LIFX.
IF Every year on a configured date THEN Change color of lights using LIFX.
IF tado switches to Away Mode THEN Turn lights off using LIFX.
IF tado switches to Away Mode THEN Turn lights off using LIFX.
IF tado switches to Home Mode THEN Turn lights on using LIFX.
IF Flash button double pressed THEN Turn on using WeMo Lighting.
IF You exit an area THEN Turn light off using Hive Active Light.
IF Switched off THEN Deactivate siren/strobe using SmartThings.
IF Cook timer finished THEN Adjust cooking mode using WeMo Slow Cooker.
IF Button press THEN Start activity using Harmony.
IF Drying cycle is over THEN Blink lights using Philips Hue.
IF A device is turned off THEN Turn off using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF Any door open THEN Turn on lights using Philips Hue.
IF Current condition changes THEN Breathe lights using LIFX.
IF Low battery condition for any vehicle THEN Change color using Philips Hue.
IF You exit an area THEN Set temperature using Wattio THERMIC.
IF Vehicle leaves a place THEN Switch off using SmartThings.
IF Vehicle leaves a place THEN Switch off using SmartThings.
IF Say a specific phrase THEN Power on device using Energenie Mi|Home.
IF Monitor a sensor value THEN Drive any Grove using Seeed.
IF Monitor a sensor value THEN Drive any Grove using Seeed.
IF Every day of the week at a configured time THEN Send a command using openHAB.
IF Action Button Pressed THEN End activity using Harmony.
IF Action Button Pressed THEN Toggle lights on/off using LIFX.
IF Every day at a configured time THEN Return to tado automatic control using tado Heating.
IF Button press THEN Set the temperature to a configured value using Hive Active Heating.
IF You exit an area THEN Turn AC unit off using Daikin Online Controller.
IF You exit an area THEN Turn AC unit off using Daikin Online Controller.
IF You exit an area THEN Switch off a socket using LightwaveRF Power.
IF New check-in at restaurant category THEN Log a meal using UP by Jawbone.
IF Leak detected THEN Change color using Philips Hue.
IF Someone known arrives home THEN Turn on lights using Philips Hue.
IF Smart Home/Away from ecobee THEN Quick add event using Google Calendar.
